args.prompt:
Generate a 4-page Chinese sales deck about Yusuan Intelligence (语算智能) enterprise AI business workspace. The deck should introduce the company's AI-powered enterprise workspace platform, highlight its core value proposition for business decision-makers, and make the case for adoption.

Slide 1: Cover - 语算智能企业AI业务工作台 - 让AI成为您的业务核心引擎
Slide 2: 产品定位与核心能力 - AI-Powered Business Workspace - describe the platform as an all-in-one AI workspace for enterprise teams, covering intelligent workflow automation, data-driven decision support, knowledge management, and cross-department collaboration
Slide 3: 为什么选择语算智能？ - Key differentiators: deep industry models, private deployment options, enterprise-grade security and compliance, rapid integration with existing systems, measurable ROI
Slide 4: 下一步行动 - Call to action: schedule a demo, pilot program options, implementation roadmap
args.sourcePrompt: Generate a Chinese editable PPT preview about Yusuan Intelligence enterprise AI business workspace. Audience: executive leadership. Goal: sales deck and decision sync. Scenario: sales-deck. Language: Chinese. Page count: 4.
